title: GX's End Update TEST
description:
A small expansion in the End won't hurt.
TestMod
body:
This mod adds mostly worldgen features and some blocks to make the End more lush, such as chorus soil, chorus roots, cracked end stone, end grass, and dry vines. It also adds some utility content, like the Voidrith upgrade template, Voidrith ores, tools, and armor, to expand the potential of this dimension.

This mod was just practice for me, and not every texture or piece of code was created by me alone.

If you encounter bugs or features you don’t like, I can’t promise I’ll fix them or take responsibility, as this is a beta version and may be discontinued.
